M-028.NAME: alembic-migrations
M-028.owns: database schema migration infrastructure, nullable VPN client preshared-key migration, MTProto assignment migration, and migration helper functions extracted from database.py

exports.fn-alembic-env: Async Alembic environment configured with SQLModel metadata
exports.fn-migration-helpers: Database migration utilities for schema introspection and data migration
exports.fn-vpn-client-psk-migration: Adds nullable encrypted preshared-key storage without invalidating existing clients
exports.fn-mtproto-assignment-migration: Adds mtproto_assignments with unique user and SNI indexes
exports.fn-mtproto-phase43-observability-migrati: Adds MTProto encrypted IP observations, admin alerts, and TTL IP block record tables.

M-028.evidence: pass-local 2026-05-20: Phase-43 migration metadata guard passed and verifies mtproto_ip_observations, mtproto_admin_alerts, and mtproto_blocked_ips schema ownership.

disaster-recovery-role.role-1: Phase-22 restore validation must compare source and restored migration state before cutover.
disaster-recovery-role.role-2: Schema or migration-state mismatch blocks emergency relocation until the operator resolves or explicitly waives the risk.

M-028.hotspot: H-012: Alembic migrations must be backward compatible with existing SQLModel.create_all behavior during transition period
H-017: Preshared-key schema must be nullable for legacy peers and mandatory only for new rotations
